acceptance_targets: [BKR-001] PASS if revised text gives one explicit on-page line near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:395 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:409 where Anika chooses to stop or report before external intervention, and the extra-hour clinic beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:233 contains at least one concrete temptation-and-refusal moment instead of summary. FAIL if agency remains inferential or adult-imposed.

[CRF-001] PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:233 is revised into at least one on-page action exchange (not a summary sentence) and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:426 plus snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:427 contain explicit uttered frustration rather than a euphemism. FAIL if either beat still reads as protective narration.

[CRF-002] PASS if revised text includes at least one explicit interior fear-or-shame beat after the slip and before Jonah's rule reset, and the text message at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:492 carries a concrete emotional or physical consequence beyond schedule facts. FAIL if aftermath remains mostly procedural.
[PRS-001] PASS if each cited span is revised to complete clauses with explicit subjects/verbs and no bare "Not X." fragment construction. FAIL if clipped fragment emphasis remains in those locations.

[FBR-007] PASS if those targeted spans no longer read as near-verbatim sensory restatements and each chapter opening uses a distinct sensory lead tied to current conflict. FAIL if the same HVAC and curry-leaf/mustard-seed phrasing remains repeated across most targeted lines.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text gives one explicit on-page line near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:395 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:409 where Anika chooses to stop or report before external intervention, and the extra-hour clinic beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:233 contains at least one concrete temptation-and-refusal moment instead of summary. FAIL if agency remains inferential or adult-imposed.
findings.problem: The chapter's claimed behavioral turn (Anika choosing sustainable restraint) is only partly earned on-page: the decisive pressure stretch is summarized, then the stop is triggered by a slip and reinforced by adult controls. The consequence chain reads as externally enforced more than self-authored.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand the hinge spans at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:233 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:395 plus snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:409 so the restraint decision is dramatized before the slip, then revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:446 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:496 so supervision consequences follow her explicit choice/reporting rather than replacing it. Strategy options: voluntary self-stop before warning breach, or immediate self-disclosure before Jonah asks.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:233 is revised into at least one on-page action exchange (not a summary sentence) and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:426 plus snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:427 contain explicit uttered frustration rather than a euphemism. FAIL if either beat still reads as protective narration.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at high-pressure beats: the second clinic block is compressed to summary at the exact moment identity change should be rendered, and the anger spike is euphemized as "swore under her breath" instead of specific language/action. This softens consequence and tension.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:233, replace summary with a short lived scene showing one concrete rep cycle where she resists overloading in real time. At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:426 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:427, replace euphemism with exact spoken words and immediate bodily aftermath. Keep diction class-aware and embodied.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text includes at least one explicit interior fear-or-shame beat after the slip and before Jonah's rule reset, and the text message at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:492 carries a concrete emotional or physical consequence beyond schedule facts. FAIL if aftermath remains mostly procedural.
findings.problem: Timidity in consequence handling: after the compulsive overrun snaps, the scene moves quickly into procedural control (timer confiscation, supervision text) before fully inhabiting Anika's fear/shame response. The prose retreats from the emotional reality the premise sets up.
findings.rewrite_direction: Between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:407 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:446, add a brief interior-consequence beat (body sensation plus self-assessment) before authority logistics take over, then sharpen the self-report at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:492 with one concrete emotional cost marker.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each cited span is revised to complete clauses with explicit subjects/verbs and no bare "Not X." fragment construction. FAIL if clipped fragment emphasis remains in those locations.
findings.problem: Elliptical clipping recurs in narration ("Not severe. Just enough." / "Not depot this time. App-driving." / "Not pain. Not fatigue."). This repeats more than twice and conflicts with the constitution's ban on clipped narration, turning emphasis into a prose tic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite those spans into grammatically complete clauses while preserving tempo at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:183, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:184, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:253, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:254, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:389, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:390. Use sentence-length variation without subject-dropping fragments.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if those targeted spans no longer read as near-verbatim sensory restatements and each chapter opening uses a distinct sensory lead tied to current conflict. FAIL if the same HVAC and curry-leaf/mustard-seed phrasing remains repeated across most targeted lines.
findings.problem: Cross-chapter diction overfits recurring token clusters from style/continuity prompts (HVAC metallic-rattle + mustard-seed/curry-leaf kitchen loop), producing mantra-like repetition and weakening chapter texture variance.
findings.rewrite_direction: Diversify sensory anchors in repeated setup zones: snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:79, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1646, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4622, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6560, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:7019, plus kitchen smell callbacks at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:13, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4630, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6120. Keep continuity, but vary lexical surface and sensory priority by chapter stakes.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
